features: ONE GEL FOR ALL SKIN: Nuage Aloe Vera Gel, essential for every home. Helps alleviate inflamed skin including sunburn, rashes, eczema, psoriasis, rosacea & acne.
HEALTHY SKIN: Aloe Vera Gel helps to heal skin that is damaged or inflamed , perfect for sun damaged, prickly heat, itchy skin. Calms, soothes and replenishes.
COOLING & SOOTHING: Alleviate itching on face or body, calms and soothes allergic skin reactions. Apply as often as required to ease discomfort
SUN SKIN CARE: Pack Nuage Aloe Vera Gel for a day out, camping, picnics and holidays. Apply to skin to immediately soothe, protect skin with clothing to prevent further sunburn, apply as required
description: Product Description Nuage Aloe Vera Gel, essential for every home. Helps alleviate inflamed skin including sunburn, rashes, eczema, psoriasis, rosacea & acne. Aloe Vera Gel helps to heal skin that is damaged or inflamed , perfect for sun damaged, prickly heat, itchy skin. Calms, soothes and replenishes. Alleviate itching on face or body, calms and soothes allergic skin reactions. Apply as often as required to ease discomfort. Pack Nuage Aloe Vera Gel for a day out, camping, picnics and holidays. Apply to skin to immediately soothe, protect skin with clothing to prevent further sunburn, apply as required. 170ml Tube Safety Warning For external use only; patch test before use; discontinue if irritation occurs; keep out of reach of children; avoid ingestion; store in a cool, dry place; do not use on broken skin; use within expiry date; avoid sharing; flammable if applicable.
